children.name: Psephotellus
children.description: Psephotellus — a genus of old world parrots in the family Psittaculidae.

children.name: Psephotellus chrysopterygius
children.description: The golden-shouldered parrot, also known as the alwal, arrmorral, minpin, thaku, or antbed parrot, is a rare bird of the southern Cape York Peninsula, in Queensland, Australia. A small parrot related to the more common hooded parrot (P. dissimilis) of the Northern Territory and the extinct paradise parrot of Queensland and New South Wales.

children.name: Psephotellus dissimilis
children.description: The hooded parrot is a species of parrot native to the Northern Territory in Australia. It is found in savannah and open woodland and is one of two extant species in its genus that breed in termite mounds. It has declined from much of its original range.

children.name: Psephotellus pulcherrimus
children.description: The paradise parrot is an extinct species of colourful medium-sized parrot native to the grassy woodlands extending across the Queensland and New South Wales border area of eastern Australia. Once moderately common within its fairly restricted range, it became extinct in 1927.

children.name: Psephotellus varius
children.description: The mulga parrot is endemic to arid scrublands and lightly timbered grasslands in the interior of southern Australia. The male mulga parrot is multicolored, from which the older common name of many-coloured parrot is derived.

children.name: Lophopsittacus
children.description: Lophopsittacus — a genus of old world parrots in the family Psittaculidae.

children.name: Lophopsittacus mauritianus
children.description: The broad-billed parrot or raven parrot is a large extinct parrot in the family Psittaculidae. It was endemic to the Mascarene island of Mauritius. The species was first referred to as the "Indian raven" in Dutch ships' journals from 1598 onwards.

children.name: Parvipsitta
children.description: Parvipsitta — a genus of old world parrots in the family Psittaculidae.

children.name: Parvipsitta porphyrocephala
children.description: The purple-crowned lorikeet, is a lorikeet found in scrub and mallee of southern Australia. It is a small lorikeet distinguished by a purple crown, an orange forehead and ear-coverts, and a light blue chin and chest.

children.name: Parvipsitta pusilla
children.description: The little lorikeet is a species of parrot in the family Psittaculidae. It is endemic to Australia. It is a small parrot, predominantly green in plumage with a red face.

children.name: Necropsittacus
children.description: Necropsittacus — a genus of old world parrots in the family Psittaculidae.

children.name: Necropsittacus rodricanus
children.description: The Rodrigues parrot or Leguat's parrot is an extinct species of parrot that was endemic to the Mascarene island of Rodrigues. The species is known from subfossil bones and from mentions in contemporary accounts. It is unclear to which other species it is most closely related, but it is classified as a member of the tribe Psittaculini, along with other Mascarene parrots.

children.name: Synorhacma
children.description: Synorhacma — a genus of old world parrots in the family Psittaculidae.

children.name: Synorhacma multistriata
children.description: The striated lorikeet is a species of parrot in the family Psittaculidae native to New Guinea. It was formerly the only species placed in the genus Synorhacma. It is threatened by habitat loss.

children.name: Saudareos
children.description: Saudareos — a genus of old world parrots in the family Psittaculidae.

children.name: Saudareos flavoviridis
children.description: The Sula lorikeet is a species of parrot in the family Psittaculidae. It is endemic to the Sula Islands in Indonesia. It is found in forest and woodland at altitudes up to 2,400 m (7,900 ft).

children.name: Saudareos johnstoniae
children.description: The Mindanao lorikeet or Mount Apo lorikeet is a species of parrot in the family Psittaculidae. It is only found in the Philippines on the island of Mindanao. Its natural habitat is tropical moist montane forests.

children.name: Hypocharmosyna
children.description: Hypocharmosyna — a genus of old world parrots in the family Psittaculidae.

children.name: Charmosynoides
children.description: Charmosynoides — a genus of old world parrots in the family Psittaculidae.

children.name: Charminetta
children.description: Charminetta — a genus of old world parrots in the family Psittaculidae.

children.name: Charmosynopsis
children.description: Charmosynopsis — a genus of old world parrots in the family Psittaculidae.

children.name: Glossoptilus
children.description: Glossoptilus — a genus of old world parrots in the family Psittaculidae.
